# Game-icons card semantic icons

Source: <https://github.com/game-icons/icons>

Imported subset for Space Syndicate prototype card faces:

- `bank.svg` — `delapouite/bank.svg`
- `profit.svg` — `lorc/profit.svg`
- `fall_down.svg` — `sbed/fall-down.svg`
- `contract.svg` — `delapouite/contract.svg`
- `breaking_chain.svg` — `skoll/breaking-chain.svg`
- `robber_hand.svg` — `darkzaitzev/robber-hand.svg`
- `cancel.svg` — `sbed/cancel.svg`
- `warehouse.svg` — `delapouite/warehouse.svg`
- `shaking_hands.svg` — `delapouite/shaking-hands.svg`
- `coins_pile.svg` — `delapouite/coins-pile.svg`

License boundary:

- The upstream `license.txt` says icons are Creative Commons 3.0 BY or CC0 where noted.
- Keep `license.txt` in this folder.
- Attribute authors in derivative work according to the upstream license.
- These files are temporary prototype/reference card art anchors. Before commercial release, either preserve complete attribution in the shipped credits or replace them with owned art.

Current player-facing use:

- `scripts/card_art_view.gd` uses this subset for high-frequency finance, contract, warehouse, direct-interaction, and counter/nullification card faces.
- These icons are intentionally used to reduce overuse of Moth Kaijuice building/mech sprites on non-monster cards.
